# Bundled technician profiles --- generated by kata.EntityFactories.technician_profile_builder.build_default_profiles
# Each line: name | n_tickets | description

trainee | 5 | Fresh hire: ~5 lifetime repairs spread thinly across the entire grid.  Knowledge volume near zero everywhere.
junior | 40 | A few months of broad on-the-job exposure: 40 repairs uniformly across component families, no specialty.
generalist | 200 | Several years of broad maintenance work: 200 repairs uniform over the grid.  Workhorse, no deep specialty.
senior | 500 | Veteran with broad coverage and a soft mechanical specialty: 500 lifetime repairs, 70% uniform, 30% biased toward the mechanical cluster.
expert | 1500 | Highly experienced generalist: 1500 lifetime repairs, broad coverage of the entire grid.  Knowledge ceiling approaches the asymptotic floor for every component family.
motor_specialist | 600 | Deep mechanical / rotating-parts specialist: 85% of 600 lifetime repairs concentrated around the motor neighbourhood, 15% incidental exposure elsewhere.
electronics_specialist | 600 | Deep electronics specialist: 85% of 600 lifetime repairs concentrated around the electronics / controller neighbourhood, 15% incidental exposure.
